subject: [PATCH v6 07/20] nfsd: add callback encoding and decoding linkages for CB_NOTIFY

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch adds encoding and decoding routines for CB_NOTIFY messages in the NFSv4 callback protocol. The encoding routine uses code generated by xdrgen to encode the message, while the decoding routine decodes the message using existing functions. Currently, the encoder is a stub that will be fleshed out in later patches. This patch also updates the nfsd state header and adds a new procedure for CB_NOTIFY to the NFSv4 callback procedures array.
